title: More Sounds
description: A Sounds mod addon that adds custom sounds and modded compatibility
body:
A Sounds mod addon that adds enhanced audio and modded compatibility

**More Sounds** brings extended mod support to the [**Sounds**](https://github.com/IMB11/Sounds) mod, adding immersive new sound effects and improving compatibility with popular Minecraft mods.

Sounds Compatibility

More Sounds **resolves compatibility issues** with: **Sophisticated Core:** > Fixed items sound not playing while using these mods - **Sophisticated Storage** - **Sophisticated Backpacks** - **Sophisticated Storage In Motion** **JEI** > Fixed item sounds not playing when selecting items **AE2** > Fixed item sounds not playing in terminals

Supported Mods

In the current version, **More Sounds** is needed on both client and server side and provides varying levels of support for the following mods: ### Full Support > These mods are fully integrated with custom sounds for every item and block. - Applied Energistics 2 (AE2) - Aether - Deep Aether - Mob Grinding Utils - Powah - Occultism - Artifacts - Relics - Mekanism Tools - Apotheosis - Ars Nouveau - Ars Elemental - Ars Additions - Iron Spells 'n Spellbooks - Glassential - Cataclysm - Gadgets Against Grind - Cataclysm Spellbooks - Building Gadgets - Patchouli - Sophisticated Storage In Motion - Advanced Netherite - Shrink - Aquaculture 2 ### Partial Support > These mods have only a few items implemented. - Twilight Forest - Reliquified Twilight Forest - Mekanism - Bumblezone - PneumaticCraft - Advanced AE - Mekanism Extras - CC: Tweaked - Advanced Peripherals - Deeper and Darker - Create 6 ### Common Sounds > Generic support for item categories. - All Dusts - All Dirty Dusts - All Bows/Crossbows - All Boats - All Raw/Cooked Fish/Meat - All Books

Found a bug or got a feature idea?

If you run into any bugs, have a mod you wanna see supported,
or notice missing block/item sounds (only applies to full support),
drop it in the Issues tab on GitHub.
